chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2860 of 2016 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No.13633/2016 2. For hearing of main case 08.04.2025 Mr. Abdul Rehman Adeed advocate holds brief for Dr. Farogh Naseem, advocate for the petitioner Ms. Zakia advocate holds brief for Mr. Ameer Bakhsh Metlo, advocate for respondent Per learned counsel for the petitioner, notice has been impugned herein, however, the petitioner intends to contest the same before the issuing authority. Learned counsel seeks that the notice be adjudicated vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending the aforesaid no coercive action be taken there against. Learned counsel for respondent articulates no cavil in such regard and states that the petition be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
